# nxos_ptp (Resource)

This resource can manage the PTP (Precision Time Protocol) configuration on NX-OS devices, including clock settings, domain configuration, notifications, interface-level PTP settings, and unicast peers.

### API Documentation

- [ptpPtpEntity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/ptp:PtpEntity/)
- [ptpPtpDomain](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/ptp:PtpDomain/)
- [ptpPtpNotifyHighCorr](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/ptp:PtpNotifyHighCorr/)
- [ptpPtpNotifyPortStateChg](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/ptp:PtpNotifyPortStateChg/)
- [ptpPtpIf](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/ptp:PtpIf/)
- [ptpPtpPeer](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/ptp:PtpPeer/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nxos_ptp" "example" {
  acl_redirect                         = "enabled"
  clock_identity                       = "01:02:03:04:05:06"
  clock_operation_one_step             = "enabled"
  clock_periodic_update                = "enabled"
  clock_periodic_update_interval       = 120
  clock_sync_auto                      = true
  convergence_time                     = 60
  correction_range_logging             = "enabled"
  correction_range_threshold           = 200000
  device_type                          = "generalizedPtp"
  domain_number                        = 1
  enhanced_client_scale                = "enabled"
  forward_version1                     = "enabled"
  grandmaster_capable_convergence_time = 60
  grandmaster_capable                  = "disabled"
  ipv6_multicast_receive_scope         = "2-13"
  ipv6_multicast_transmit_scope        = 2
  mean_path_delay                      = 500000000
  management                           = "disabled"
  multi_domain                         = "enabled"
  multi_domain_transition_priority1    = 128
  multi_domain_transition_priority2    = 128
  notify_grandmaster_change            = "enabled"
  notify_parent_change                 = "enabled"
  offload                              = "enabled"
  peer_delay_request_interval          = 1
  priority1                            = 128
  priority2                            = 128
  using_system_clock                   = true
  scale_1g                             = true
  source_ip                            = "10.1.1.1"
  source_ipv6                          = "2001:db8::1"
  tolerance_mean_path_delay_state      = "enabled"
  tolerance_mean_path_delay_value      = "50"
  tolerance_reverse_path_delay_state   = "enabled"
  tolerance_reverse_path_delay_value   = "50"
  vrf_name                             = "default"
  vrf_name_ipv6                        = "default"
  domains = {
    "1" = {
      clock_accuracy_threshold = 200
      clock_class_threshold    = 200
      priority                 = 128
    }
  }
  notify_high_correction_interval   = 10
  notify_high_correction            = "enabled"
  notify_high_correction_periodic   = "enabled"
  notify_port_state_change_category = "all"
  notify_port_state_change_interval = 10
  notify_port_state_change          = "enabled"
  notify_port_state_change_periodic = "enabled"
  interfaces = {
    "eth1/1" = {
      announce_interval_type               = "aes67"
      announce_interval_value              = 2
      announce_timeout_type                = "aes67"
      announce_timeout_value               = 3
      asymmetric_delay_value               = 1000
      asymmetric_direction                 = "forward-path"
      delay_request_min_interval_type      = "aes67"
      delay_request_min_interval_value     = 0
      ipv6_multicast_receive_scope         = "1-14"
      ipv6_multicast_transmit_scope        = 2
      negotiation_schema                   = "schema1"
      neighbor_propagation_delay_threshold = 500000
      profile_override                     = true
      ptp                                  = true
      cost                                 = 128
      destination_mac                      = "forwardable"
      domain                               = 1
      receive_no_match                     = "drop"
      role                                 = "master"
      sync_interval_type                   = "aes67"
      sync_interval_value                  = -1
      transmission                         = "multicast"
      transport                            = "ipv4"
      unicast_source                       = "10.2.2.1"
      unicast_source_ipv6                  = "2001:db8::1"
      unicast_vrf                          = "default"
      unicast_vrf_ipv6                     = "default"
      vlan                                 = "vlan-100"
      peers = {
        "10.1.1.2" = {
          negotiation_schema = "schema1"
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `acl_redirect` (String) PTP acl redirect enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `clock_identity` (String) PTP clock-identity MAC Address.
- `clock_operation_one_step` (String) PTP Clock Operation One Step PTP enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `clock_periodic_update` (String) PTP clock periodic-update enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `clock_periodic_update_interval` (Number) PTP clok periodic-update interval value.
  - Range: `0`-`3600`
- `clock_sync_auto` (Boolean) PTP clock-sync auto yes/no.
- `convergence_time` (Number) PTP convergence-time value.
  - Range: `3`-`2600`
- `correction_range_logging` (String) PTP correction range logging enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `correction_range_threshold` (Number) PTP correction range threshold.
  - Range: `10`-`1000000000`
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `device_type` (String) PTP Device Type bounday clock/ generalized PTP.
  - Choices: `boundaryClock`, `generalizedPtp`, `ordinaryClockGm`
- `domain_number` (Number) PTP Clock Domain number to use for this clock.
  - Range: `0`-`127`
- `domains` (Attributes Map) PTP Domain Object for multiple Domain properties.
  - Map key: `domain` - PTP Clock Domain value.
  - Key range: `0`-`127` (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--domains))
- `enhanced_client_scale` (String) PTP enhanced multicast client scale enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `forward_version1` (String) PTP forwarding of PTPv1 packets enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `grandmaster_capable` (String) PTP grandmaster-capable enable/disable.
  - Choices: `disabled`, `enabled`
- `grandmaster_capable_convergence_time` (Number) PTP grandmaster-capable convergence-time value.
  - Range: `3`-`2600`
- `interfaces` (Attributes Map) PTP interface configuration.
  - Map key: `interface_id` - Interface id of port with PTP configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interfaces))
- `ipv6_multicast_receive_scope` (String) PTP over IPv6 multicast dest IP scope for receive.
- `ipv6_multicast_transmit_scope` (Number) PTP over IPv6 multicast dest IP scope for transmit.
  - Range: `0`-`65535`
- `management` (String) PTP management packet support enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `mean_path_delay` (Number) PTP Mean Path Delay.
  - Range: `10`-`1000000000`
- `multi_domain` (String) PTP multi-domain enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `multi_domain_transition_priority1` (Number) PTP multi-domain transition-attributes Priority 1 value.
  - Range: `0`-`255`
- `multi_domain_transition_priority2` (Number) PTP multi-domain transition-attributes Priority 2 value.
  - Range: `0`-`255`
- `notify_grandmaster_change` (String) PTP gm-change notification enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `notify_high_correction` (String) PTP high-correction notification enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `notify_high_correction_interval` (Number) PTP high-correction notification interval.
  - Range: `0`-`300`
- `notify_high_correction_periodic` (String) PTP high-correction notification periodic-notification.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `notify_parent_change` (String) PTP parent-change notification enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `notify_port_state_change` (String) PTP port-state-change notification enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `notify_port_state_change_category` (String) PTP port-state-change notification category.
  - Choices: `master-slave-only`, `all`
- `notify_port_state_change_interval` (Number) PTP port-state-change notification interval.
  - Range: `0`-`300`
- `notify_port_state_change_periodic` (String) PTP port-state-change notification periodic-notification.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `offload` (String) PTP offload enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `peer_delay_request_interval` (Number) PTP peer delay request interval.
  - Range: `0`-`5`
- `priority1` (Number) PTP priority1 value to use when advertising the clock.
  - Range: `0`-`255`
- `priority2` (Number) PTP priority2 value to use when advertising the clock.
  - Range: `0`-`255`
- `scale_1g` (Boolean) ptp packets timestamping at asic for 1g ports.
- `source_ip` (String) PTP source IPv4 address for all the PTP packets in the multicast PTP mode.
- `source_ipv6` (String) PTP source IPv6 address for all the PTP packets in the multicast PTP mode.
- `tolerance_mean_path_delay_state` (String) PTP tolerance mean path delay threshold enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `tolerance_mean_path_delay_value` (String) PTP tolerance mean path delay threshold.
- `tolerance_reverse_path_delay_state` (String) PTP tolerance reverse path delay threshold enable/disable.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `tolerance_reverse_path_delay_value` (String) PTP tolerance reverse path delay threshold.
- `using_system_clock` (Boolean) PTP using system-clock to form full ptp time.
- `vrf_name` (String) PTP vrf name for ptp source ip.
- `vrf_name_ipv6` (String) PTP vrf name for ptp source ipv6.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.

<a id="nestedatt--domains"></a>
### Nested Schema for `domains`

Optional:

- `clock_accuracy_threshold` (Number) Domain clock-accuracy-threshold value.
  - Range: `0`-`255`
- `clock_class_threshold` (Number) Domain clock-class-threshold value.
  - Range: `0`-`255`
- `priority` (Number) Priority value for PTP Domain.
  - Range: `0`-`255`


<a id="nestedatt--interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces`

Optional:

- `announce_interval_type` (String) PTP announce interval time code.
  - Choices: `none`, `aes67`, `smpte-2059-2`
- `announce_interval_value` (Number) PTP announce interval value.
  - Range: `-3`-`4`
- `announce_timeout_type` (String) PTP announce timeout time code.
  - Choices: `none`, `aes67`, `smpte-2059-2`
- `announce_timeout_value` (Number) PTP announce timeout value.
  - Range: `2`-`10`
- `asymmetric_delay_value` (Number) compensation time(ns) for asymmetric delay.
  - Range: `0`-`512000000`
- `asymmetric_direction` (String) asymmetric delay directionfrom master to slave OR slave to master.
  - Choices: `none`, `forward-path`, `reverse-path`
- `cost` (Number) PTP cost value in interface.
  - Range: `0`-`255`
- `delay_request_min_interval_type` (String) PTP delay-request minimum interval time code.
  - Choices: `none`, `aes67`, `smpte-2059-2`
- `delay_request_min_interval_value` (Number) PTP delay-request minimum interval value.
  - Range: `-4`-`6`
- `destination_mac` (String) PTP destination mac forwardable or non-forwardable.
  - Choices: `non-forwardable`, `forwardable`
- `domain` (Number) PTP domain value in interface.
  - Range: `0`-`127`
- `ipv6_multicast_receive_scope` (String) PTP over IPv6 multicast dest IP scope for receive.
- `ipv6_multicast_transmit_scope` (Number) PTP over IPv6 multicast dest IP scope for transmit.
  - Range: `0`-`65535`
- `negotiation_schema` (String) Unicast negotiation schema for interface.
- `neighbor_propagation_delay_threshold` (Number) GPTP propagation delay threshold.
  - Range: `5`-`2000000`
- `peers` (Attributes Map) Peer IP address for transport mode.
  - Map key: `ip` - IP address value for transport mode. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--interfaces--peers))
- `profile_override` (Boolean) Allow override of configuration limits imposed by global PTP profile.
- `ptp` (Boolean) PTP enable or disable at interface level.
- `receive_no_match` (String) PTP packets destination MAC with RX packet not matching.
  - Choices: `accept`, `drop`, `follow-rx`
- `role` (String) Transport role for PTP interface with default master.
  - Choices: `master`, `slave`, `dynamic`
- `sync_interval_type` (String) PTP sync interval time code.
  - Choices: `none`, `aes67`, `smpte-2059-2`
- `sync_interval_value` (Number) PTP sync interval value.
  - Range: `-7`-`1`
- `transmission` (String) Transport mode for PTP interface with default multicast.
  - Choices: `multicast`, `unicast`
- `transport` (String) Transport type for PTP interface with default IPv4.
  - Choices: `ipv4`, `ipv6`, `eth`
- `unicast_source` (String) Source IPv4 address for ucast messages.
- `unicast_source_ipv6` (String) Source IPv6 address for ucast messages.
- `unicast_vrf` (String) VRF to be used for ptp messages.
- `unicast_vrf_ipv6` (String) VRF to be used for Ipv6 ptp messages.
- `vlan` (String) PTP VLAN id configuration.

<a id="nestedatt--interfaces--peers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `interfaces.peers`

Optional:

- `negotiation_schema` (String) Unicast negotiation schema for peer.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to       = nxos_ptp.example
  identity = {}
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema


#### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = nxos_ptp.example
  id = ""
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import nxos_ptp.example ""
```
